description: IranWire is an independent investigative journalism outlet founded in 2014 by Maziar Bahari, the Iranian-Canadian journalist and filmmaker who was imprisoned in Iran for 118 days in 2009 and coerced into a televised confession on [IRIB](/orgs/irib). Headquartered in London and funded through grants, IranWire produces investigative reporting on [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) corruption, human rights abuses, executions, and political repression in Iran.
editorial_notes: Founded by Maziar Bahari. Grant-funded. Based in London.
